name: akbun-draw
description: Image drawing skills by akbun — image-generation prompts and editable SVGs in fixed akbun styles

interface.shortDescription: Image drawing skills in fixed akbun styles
interface.longDescription: Image drawing skills that turn any subject, story, or code into image-generation prompts (GPT image, nano-banana, etc.) and Figma/Canva-editable SVGs, each in a fixed akbun illustration style — webtoons, posters, card news, book figures, sketch text, and the akbun whale mascot spec.
defaultPrompt: Make an image prompt that explains this code as a blog figure
Make a 3 or 4 panel webtoon prompt from this story
Make a pastel animal-character webtoon page (image prompts + Figma/Canva SVG) from these images and story
Make a landscape one-cut essay-toon page with the whale mascot (image prompt + Figma/Canva SVG) from this story
Make a stitched-text image prompt for a motivational quote
Make a pencil sketchbook concept-card image prompt for this topic
Make a minimal poster card image prompt and a Figma/Canva-ready SVG from this image
Draw this subject in the monogray flat-ink style (image prompt + Figma/Canva SVG)
Make a book-figure image prompt and an editable SVG using a fixed layout (icon strip, zoom, dialog, flow, or poster card)
Make a naive-doodle safety issue card-news with whale characters (image prompt + Figma/Canva SVG) from this situation
Make a cream handwritten explainer card-news (image prompt + Figma/Canva SVG) for this concept
Make a whale-mascot cheatsheet poster (image prompt + Figma/Canva SVG) for this topic
Make hand-drawn marker sketch illustration prompts for each scene of this story
Make a quiet cream pencil-sketch scene image prompt with one teal accent from this moment
Describe the akbun whale mascot character spec for use in another drawing skill
